doc: Registry of removed schema fields. Each active entry is grepped across its producer surfaces by validate.sh Check 50. Add an entry here when removing a field from the task schema so future branches cannot silently re-introduce it. See E2026-05-20-6 and t-1565.

removed_fields.note: stream field removed from task schema; replaced by work_type. Caused two re-injection regressions (E2026-05-20-5/6) before this gate was added.
